coveo:metadata.title: Accelerating Mobility Innovation with Advanced Material Solutions
coveo:metadata.description: Discover how Formerra’s material science expertise solves mobility innovation challenges — lightweighting, EV performance & supply chain resilience.

coveo:metadata.title: Alternatives to Antimony in Flame-Retardant Polymers
coveo:metadata.description: Antimony trioxide (ATO) volatility is reshaping flame-retardant material choices. Explore why OEMs and processors are reassessing FR ABS systems, what alternatives exist, and how Formerra helps teams balance compliance, aesthetics, and performance.

coveo:metadata.title: Consumer Medical Wearables: A Q&A on Usability, Materials, and Regulatory Expectations
Decoding the SVHC List Under Reach
Resin Supply in Europe: FAQs on Shortages, REACH & Alternative Sourcing
coveo:metadata.description: European resin supply constraints are impacting manufacturers. Explore FAQs on polymer shortages, REACH compliance, and sourcing options for European production.

coveo:metadata.title: How Formerra Solved Shrinkage Challenges Without Retooling
coveo:metadata.description: Discover how Formerra helped a leading powersports manufacturer avoid $1 million in retooling costs and six months of downtime by solving a critical shrink-rate issue with a material science approach.

coveo:metadata.title: How to Reduce Medical Device Recall Risk
coveo:metadata.description: Medical device recalls hit a 15-year high in 2024. Learn key causes and best practices to minimize risks and protect patient safety.

coveo:metadata.title: Polymer Processing Aids: Reduce Your Cycle Times by Up to 25%
coveo:metadata.description: Boost polymer production efficiency with Formerra’s polymer processing aids. Reduce cycle times, eliminate defects & cut costs for peak resin performance.

coveo:metadata.title: Powering EV Progress: How Metal-to-Plastic Conversion Delivered Big Results
coveo:metadata.description: Discover how a leading EV manufacturer achieved over $1 million in annual savings and zero production downtime by converting metal components to PC/ABS plastic with Formerra’s technical expertise and hands-on support.

coveo:metadata.title: REACH Quietly Redrawing the Rules for North America
Solving for Scale: How Formerra Helped a Healthcare OEM Avoid Re-Tooling
